brain_files.title: Founder Thinking
brain_files.purpose: Teaches Claude the founder’s default product-thinking pattern: complete means consequence, visibility, persistence and proof.

brain_files.title: Product Philosophy
brain_files.purpose: Defines product principles: user journeys, operational truth, visible consequences, no toy demos, no hidden gaps.

brain_files.title: Quality Bar
brain_files.purpose: Defines what good enough means for specs, screens, APIs, data, audit, security, journeys and deployment.

brain_files.title: Gap Detection Heuristics
brain_files.purpose: Gives Claude founder-like heuristics to spot API-only, screen-only, table-only, status-only, local-only and missing-effect gaps.

brain_files.title: Bug Fix Method
brain_files.purpose: Turns bug fixing into feature/journey/effect diagnosis instead of one-line patching.

brain_files.title: Feature Completion Definition
brain_files.purpose: Defines when a feature/module can be marked complete.

brain_files.title: Examples: Good vs Bad
brain_files.purpose: Concrete examples of shallow build vs complete build.

brain_files.title: Project Memory
brain_files.purpose: Reusable living memory for mismatches, founder corrections and future rules.

brain_files.title: Decision Patterns
brain_files.purpose: Reusable patterns for deciding what to build, fix, stop, ask or verify.

brain_files.title: When To Stop And Ask
brain_files.purpose: Defines stop conditions and when Claude must not improvise.

brain_files.title: Self Review Questions
brain_files.purpose: Questions Claude must ask before claiming completion.

brain_files.title: Brain + Skills + Packs Operating Model
brain_files.purpose: Defines how brain, skills, packs and code work together.
